title: dendranthema boreale
intro: Dendranthema boreale, also known as Russian chamomile or boreal daisy, is a perennial herb native to Eastern Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Dendranthema boreale include its ability to soothe anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality due to its calming effects. Dendranthema boreale is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
